ERRORCODE.ERRMSG: The eCL data source is null!
The DB Update Failure!
eCL Transaction has failed!
eCL Limit Transfer has failed!
eCL Move Customer has failed!
This limit transfer has not corresponding TakeDown!
Current transaction was suspended!
All transaction was suspended!
eCL:The risk code of the from limit level is smaller than the risk code of the to limit!
eCL Sublimit and Facility cannot be empty!
eCL:This Customer/Bank/Country is not in the limits system!
eCL:Sublimit input is invalid!
eCL:Facility input is invalid!
eCL:To Sublimit input is invalid!
eCL:To Facility input is invalid!
eCL:Related Customer ID input is invalid!
eCL:The sublimit [ $1$ ] does not belong to the customer [ $2$ ] !
eCL:The Member Facility ID [ $1$ ] is invalid !
eCL:Can not find the specified customer [ $1$ ] !
eCL:Limit Records for [ Customer ID : $1$ | Sublimit ID: $2$ | Member Facility ID: $3$ ] is currently being used by other user, please try later!
eCL:Limit Records for [ Group ID : $1$ | General Facility ID: $2$ ] is currently being used by other user, please try later!
eCL:The sublimit [ $1$ ] does not belong to the Customer [ $2$ ] !
eCL:The sublimit [ $1$ ] is inactive!
eCL:The sublimit [ $1$ ] does not have the Member Facility [ $2$ ]!
eCL:The member facility [ $1$ ] is inactive!
eCL:The transaction due date should be earlier than the due date [ $1$ ] of the $2$ level!
eCL:The transaction value date should be later than the start date [ $1$ ] of the $2$ level!
eCL:System can not pass the Tenor check!
eCL:System can not pass the Mddr check!
eCL:Can not get the correct exchange from $1$ to $2$ !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of sublimit level [ $1$ ]!
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of sublimit level [ $1$ ]!
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of Member Facility level [ $1$ ]!
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of Member Facility level [ $1$ ]!
eCL:Limit Records for [ Sublimit ID: $1$ ] is currently being used by other user, please try later!
eCL:Need check log (e.g. The error likes as the Null Pointer Exception). Contact IT.
eCL:The Customer [ $1$ ] is inactive !
eCL:This TakeDown could get the RePayment of one Transaction!
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of Customer level [ $1$] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of Customer level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The Group [ $1$ ] is inactive !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of the Group level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of the Group level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:Limit Records for [ Group ID: $1$ ] is currently being used by other user, please try later!
eCL:The Parent Group [ $1$ ] is inactive !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of the Parent Group level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of the Parent Group level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of the Facility Level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of the Facility Level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The related TakeDown couldn't be found !
eCL:The Available balance equals to 0,so system does not allow you to do payment transaction !
eCL:Total RePayment amount exceeds the total TakeDown amount balance amount [$1$] !
eCL:When automatically create customer,the auto-currency can not be empty !
eCL:Get limit transfer info failed !
eCL:Pay amount is larger than the needed amount!
eCL:Transfer amount is larger than the available balance [$1$ ] of [$2$].
eCL:The pay amount [ $1$ ] is larger than needed [$2$] !
eCL:From customer does not exist!
eCL:To customer does not exist!
eCL:Cannot find the specified Customer ID!
eCL:The Start day in Customer level should later than its in group level!
eCL:The credit line in Customer level cannot exceed its in group level!
eCL:The Due day in Customer level should earlier than its in group level!
eCL:The Customer and The group had been in one combined limit ,so you cannot move it!
eCL:The Sublimit and The group had been in one combined limit ,so you cannot move it!
eCL:The Member Facility and The group had been in one combined limit ,so you cannot move it!
eCL:Can not find related sublimit!
eCL:Can not find related member facility!
eCL:This group can not be deleted as some customer belong to it!
eCL:This customer can not be deleted as some sublimit belong to it!
eCL:This sublimit can not be deleted as some member facility belong to it!
eCL:This facility can not be deleted as sublimit has used it!
eCL:REV-Can not find $1$ level [$2$] !
eCL:REV - Can not find the Rate from $1$ to [$2$] in STDS_TRAT Table!
eCL:Revaluate Transaction Rate Failed!
eCL:Need RSV_LINK info!
eCL:Need C_DS_ID node!
eCL:Please check you parameter,the field [Prompt details message ] should be ticked!
eCL:Not has matched records!
eCL:The Transaction will not check any level available balance,because it uses the override type facility!
eCL:Can not get the decimal of the currency [ $1$ ]!
eCL:Need RSV_Type info!
eCL:The Parent Sublimit [ $1$ ] is inactive !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the available balance of the Parent Sublimit level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:The transaction amount can not be larger than the special allowance of the Parent Sublimit level [ $1$ ] !
eCL:It has child Level or has been used, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The deleted item has been used by the combine limit rule, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The deleted item has been used by the share limit rule, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The Combined limit's outstanding doesn't equal to 0, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The Shared limit's outstanding doesn't equal to 0, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The deleted item's outstanding doesn't equal to 0, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL: The Related outstanding of table named STDS_SUMN doesn't equal to 0, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
eCL:The Related transfer amount in the table named STDS_SUMS doesn't equal to 0, so system doesn't allow you to delete it! !
